headline: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
summary: NTS Radio launches a dedicated player with Atonemo for hi-fi systems. It offers NTS mixes and popular streaming services like Spotify. Features AirPlay 2, Google Cast, and Tidal Connect support.

headline: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
summary: Amazon MGM has dropped Luca Guadagnino's film "Artificial" about Sam Altman. The movie starred Andrew Garfield, covering Altman's 2023 OpenAI saga. The project was in development for about a year before being shelved.

headline: Our long national sunscreen nightmare is almost over
summary: A new FDA-approved sunscreen ingredient, Bemotrizinol, is set to end the "sunscreen nightmare". This update comes via The Verge's "Optimizer" newsletter. It counters misinformation from social media trends like TikTok.

headline: T1 Phone PR firm is 'not assisting Trump Mobile any further'
summary: Trump Mobile's PR firm has officially ceased its assistance. Customers who preordered the T1 Phone still haven't received their devices. The company faces ongoing criticism for poor communication and product delivery.

headline: Woody Shouldn’t Even Be in Toy Story 5
summary: An IGN analysis argues against Woody's return in "Toy Story 5". It suggests Woody's character arc concluded in previous films. The article questions the necessity of his inclusion in the new installment.

headline: Sony Ditches Mention of PC Releases From Business Strategy Document, as PlayStation's Single-Player Games Now Expected to Be Fully Exclusive
summary: Sony's new strategy document omits mention of PC releases for first-party titles. This implies PlayStation's single-player games will now be fully console exclusive. The shift signals a reversal in Sony's recent multiplatform approach.

headline: Tom Holland Tries to Avoid Spoiling if Spider-Man is in Avengers: Doomsday or Secret Wars — and Essentially Confirms He Is
summary: Tom Holland seemingly confirmed Spider-Man's involvement in future Avengers films. He dodged specific spoilers but strongly hinted at appearances in "Doomsday" or "Secret Wars". Fans eagerly anticipate Spider-Man's role in the next major MCU crossover.

headline: Darth Maul Voice Actor Slams Star Wars: The Phantom Menace as 'The Biggest Disappointment of My Life' and Says His Pay Was 'S***'
summary: Darth Maul's voice actor, Peter Serafinowicz, slammed "The Phantom Menace". He called it "the biggest disappointment" of his life and criticized his "s***" pay. Serafinowicz's comments highlight lingering frustrations with the film.

headline: Henry Zeffman: What does Keir Starmer do next after Andy Burnham's Makerfield win?
summary: Andy Burnham's Makerfield win sparks discussion on Keir Starmer's next steps. The by-election victory is a significant development for Labour. It could influence the party's strategic direction moving forward.

headline: Boy, 3, hurt at zoo was attacked by a crocodile
summary: A three-year-old boy was attacked by a crocodile at a zoo. Police arrested a man on suspicion of attempted murder. The suspect has since been released on bail.

headline: 'Neither I nor Italy ever beg': Meloni says Trump made up story about photo
summary: Italian PM Giorgia Meloni fiercely denied Trump's story about a photo. She asserted, "Neither I nor Italy ever beg." The public exchange indicates a notable strain in their previous close relationship.

headline: Historic by-election win sends message to Labour and SNP, says Badenoch
summary: Scottish Conservatives secured a historic by-election win in Aberdeen South. Kemi Badenoch hailed the victory, their first since 1973. This result sends a strong message to both Labour and the SNP.
